subcodes.first_line: Praise befitteth the Desired One Who, with His holy footsteps, adorned the celestial realms and through His existence brought forth creation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقصودی را لایق و سزاست که بقدم پاک افلاک را مزین نمود و آفرینش را بوجودش
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @personal instructions, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
